homepage.title: Bayo Alaba - For Southend East and Rochford
homepage.h1: I am Bayo Alaba, Southend East and Rochford's first ever Labour MP
homepage.meta_description: I'm Bayo Alaba, and I aim to become Southend East and Rochford's first Labour MP.
headings: h2: I have already hit the ground running, working with local authorities and other key stakeholders.
h2: Bayo's PLan for the General Election
h3: Build a united team across the CLP
h3: Build a united team across the CLP
h3: Hold, win back and gain council seats
h3: Hold, win back and gain council seats
h3: It was a pleasure to meet you when you took the time to personally canvass on Shoeburyness Garrison
h3: I was very impressed meeting you. For you to personally canvass door-to-door in cold February shows your commitment coupled with a strong work ethic and pure dedication.
h3: Right behind your campaign! I’m sure you'll make a great MP!
h3: Enjoyed meeting you when you called at my block of flats recently in Southchurch. I wish you great success.
h3: Bayo is unlike any other politician that I’ve known in recent times. I am 100% voting for him,
h3: I think you have an excellent chance of winning and wish you every success.
h3: After canvassing my home, if you need a vote from me then you have it! Good luck!
h3: Bayo Alaba’s speech on becoming the first Labour MP of Southend East & Rochford has sold me 100%!
h3: Look forward to helping you into the House of Commons
h3: I am inspired by your passion and experience with youth in the area
h3: I think you would be great for Southend East and Rochford!

homepage.text_excerpt: Bayo Alaba - For Southend East and Rochford Skip to content → Bayo Alaba Home Pride in Shoeburyness Chair Applications Board Member Applications Have Your Say News Get Help Stay Informed Home Pride in Shoeburyness Chair Applications Board Member Applications Have Your Say News Get Help Stay Informed I am Bayo Alaba, Southend East and Rochford's first ever Labour MP Bayo In Parliament Contributions in parliament from Mr Bayo Alaba Find Out More Introduction I have already hit the ground running, working with local authorities and other key stakeholders. As your MP, I am focused squarely on fulfilling the potential of Southend and banging the drum, through creating a stronger economic centre of gravity for the city and a ‘year-round’ economy to keep talented young people here. At the constituency level my aim is to be as visible and responsive an MP as possible. I’ll work across the whole of the seat, and roll my sleaves up to tackle casework. The plan Bayo's PLan for the General Election 1 Mobilisation 1 Mobilisation We will empower, train, and support local activists to campaign on issues that matter to local people, like better bus routes and more interests for young people. I aim to build support and contacts to help strengthen and champion labours position electorally across Southend East and Rochford. 2 Voter Registration 2 Voter Registration We will increase voter registration, sign up postal votes and turnout by working closely with community organisations and activists. 3 Fundraising 3 Fundraising I will use my experience, skills and networks in marketing, events, and hospitality to support trade unions, local businesses and RSE’s diverse and active community groups, to ensure Southend Labour has strong campaigning funds for the General election. Funds would also go towards supporting a full-time city organiser. 4 Build a united team across the CLP 4 Build a united team across the CLP As a former soldier and self-made businessperson, building, motivating, and organising teams is something I have done my entire working life. As a committee member of Labour Friends of The Forces, CLP Business Liaison Officer, and business owner, I will draw upon my contacts with the Labour Movement for resources, campaigning support and policy ideas as well utilising my creative industry networks. 5 Hold, win back and gain council seats 5 Hold, win back and gain council seats I have worked with Southend and Rochford councillors and candidates across the city and surrounding areas over the past 16 months. I have the skills, drive, and the right temperament to mobilise, inspire and acquire resources for a successful campaign. For the coming local and imminent General Election, ensuring the relationship between the councillors, candidates, CLP organiser, Local Campaign Forum and activists is strong, supportive and collaborative. What I stand for Economic Regeneration Economic regeneration that enables our young people to stay local is key to Southend East and Rochford’s future. Young people need to have access to decent paid work locally to negate the need to leave the area after their studies have completed. Our young should be able to lay their ‘anchor’ where they grew up! Reviving Southend Together Putting Southend back on the map is my aim for Southend East and Rochford. Our high streets across the constituency have a rich history, which will help us create its future. Support for new, small, and medium businesses, as well as startups, to find a home in the constituency is a core aim of mine. Affordable housing Council housing revolution for current and future generations of Southend East and Rochford is paramount. I stand for grandparents seeing their children and grandchildren regularly because they have access to nearby, affordable local/affordable housing. Supporting these new developments will be a focus on local infrastructure (GP Surgeries, medical centres, parking, roads, and schools), to ensure new and existing developments

pages.title: Bayo Alaba - For Southend East and Rochford
pages.h1: Have Your Say! Pride in Shoeburyness
headings: h3: "Stay Informed, Stay Engaged – Follow Us for Updates and the Latest News!"
h3: Stay Informed Southend and Rochford Matters
pages.text_excerpt: Bayo Alaba - For Southend East and Rochford Skip to content → Bayo Alaba Home Pride in Shoeburyness Chair Applications Board Member Applications Have Your Say News Get Help Stay Informed Home Pride in Shoeburyness Chair Applications Board Member Applications Have Your Say News Get Help Stay Informed Have Your Say! Pride in Shoeburyness Your voice is the foundation of this plan. We understand that not everyone has the time or the desire to take on a formal role on the Board, but every person who lives or works in Shoeburyness has a unique perspective on what our community needs most. Whether you have a bold vision for the regeneration of West Road and Ness Road, or you simply want to highlight a small local improvement that would make a big difference to your daily life, we want to hear from you. This questionnaire is your direct line to the decision-making process. By sharing your thoughts, you are ensuring that this £20 million investment is spent on the things that matter most to you and your neighbours. Please take a few minutes to complete the community questionnaire below and help us build a better Shoeburyness together: Community Questionnaire First Name Last Name Email * Postcode * Phone Number 1. How long have you lived in this neighbourhood? — Please choose an option — Less than 1 year 1-5 years 5-10 years More than 10 years 2. In one word, how would you best describe your community? 3. What do you enjoy most about living here? (E.g. community spirit, green spaces, local facilities, location) 4. Which of the following issues matter most to you? (Select up to 3) Local roads and footpaths Crime and anti-social behaviour Public transport Community centres and services Playgrounds and green spaces Health and care services Housing and regeneration Education and employment support Culture and leisure facilities Other (please specify): 5. What is the single most important improvement you’d like to see in your neighbourhood if funding were available? 6. In your view, who are the key people or local groups already doing good work here? 7. Any other thoughts you’d like to share? I would like to be contacted with your newsletter and future announcements. I confirm that I have read and understood the Privacy Notice and understand how my personal data will be used and shared as part of the Pride in Place application process. We will use the information you provide to administer the Pride in Place application process. Your data will be shared with the MP office, Southend City Council, specialist advisers, and the Chair (once selected). Read the full privacy notice here: Board Member Privacy Policy If you have any questions, either before or after you submit this application, please contact us at: [email protected] If you require assistance in completing this application, then please also make contact and we may be able to arrange this. Security Verification: Bayo In Parliament Contributions in parliament from Mr Bayo Alaba Find Out More Proud to be supported by "Stay Informed, Stay Engaged – Follow Us for Updates and the Latest News!" Donate Help fund our crucial campaigns to win. Donate now to the Labour Party in Southend East and Rochford. Donate Now --> Stay Informed Southend and Rochford Matters I'm Bayo Alaba, MP for Southend East and Rochford. Southend and Rochford Matters is a regular newsletter, updating constituents on what I've been up to. Simply enter your email address below to sign up. © 2026 Bayo Alaba . pages.title: Bayo Alaba - For Southend East and Rochford
pages.meta_description: I'm Bayo Alaba, and I aim to become Southend East and Rochford's first Labour MP.
headings: h2: It can be hard to find the right help
h2: What I can help with
h2: What I can’t help with
h3: "Stay Informed, Stay Engaged – Follow Us for Updates and the Latest News!"
h3: Stay Informed Southend and Rochford Matters
pages.text_excerpt: Bayo Alaba - For Southend East and Rochford Skip to content → Bayo Alaba Home Pride in Shoeburyness Chair Applications Board Member Applications Have Your Say News Get Help Stay Informed Home Pride in Shoeburyness Chair Applications Board Member Applications Have Your Say News Get Help Stay Informed Can I help you? It can be hard to find the right help Sometimes when faced with an issue like being served with a section 21 eviction notice or struggling with navigating the complexities of PIP renewal or applying for a parking scheme around your property, it can be an overwhelming time knowing what is out there or who can help. As your MP they are things we can help with or sometimes your local authority or a community organisation is best placed to help. Check if you are a constituent at members.parliament.uk . Community Organisation South Essex Community Hub Website: https://sech-uk.com/ Telephone: 01702 611199 Provides support with housing applications, benefits, navigating local services and more. Located in the Victoria Shopping Centre with both drop-in and appointment services. South Essex Advocacy Services Website: https://www.southessexadvocacy.org/ Telephone: 01702 340566 Supports vulnerable or isolated adults by helping them understand their rights and access appropriate services. Citizens Advice Southend Website: https://www.citizensadvicesouthend.org.uk/ Telephone: 01702 456352 Provides free advice on housing, employment, benefits, debt and energy issues. Rochford Community Hub Email: [email protected] Telephone: 01268 779999 Rochford District Neighbourhood Watch Email: [email protected] Telephone: 01268 770519 South Essex Extended Services Email: [email protected] Telephone: 01702 545771 Citizens Advice Braintree and South Essex Telephone: 0808 278 7877 Homelessness support services St Vincent’s Southend Email: [email protected] Telephone: 01702 592980 One Love Project Email: [email protected] Salvation Army Southend Email: [email protected] Telephone: 01702 348999 HARP Telephone: 01702 615000 Royal British Legion Website: https://www.britishlegion.org.uk/ Email: [email protected] Telephone: 0808 802 8080 Food Banks Storehouse Website: https://www.southendvineyard.org.uk/storehouse/ Southend Foodbank Website: https://southend.foodbank.org.uk/ The Shoebury Ark Website: https://shoeburyark.org.uk/ </p Mental Health Support If you’re struggling with your mental health, support is available. Samaritans Website: https://www.samaritans.org/ Telephone: 116 123 Available 24 hours a day, 365 days a year Support if you’re finding it hard to cope Support if you’re worried about someone else Cost of Living Support Southend Residents Website: https://www.southend.gov.uk/costofliving Rochford Residents Website: https://www.rochford.gov.uk/cost-of-living Community Safety Essex Police Website: https://www.essex.police.uk/ Crimestoppers Website: https://crimestoppers-uk.org/news-media/community/Essex Health Services Find a GP Website: https://www.nhs.uk/service-search/find-a-gp Find a Dentist Website: https://www.nhs.uk/nhs-services/dentists/how-to-find-an-nhs-dentist/ Mid and South Essex NHS Foundation Trust Website: https://www.mse.nhs.uk/ Essex Partnership University NHS Foundation Trust Website: https://www.eput.nhs.uk/ What I can help with Housing enquiries (including banding allocation updates/reviews, disrepair, homelessness) Universal credit issues Health (including treatment delays and referrals to Social Care) Enquiries to Government departments such as the Department for Work and Pensions and HMRC. Education (SEND issues and difficulties with schooling) What I can’t help with I cannot provide legal advice nor immigration advice as this is something I am not permitted to do due parliamentary protocol I also cannot influence Court decisions Local Council Issues Many everyday issues are handled directly by your local council. Reporting them directly can often resolve the issue faster. Southend City Council – Report an Is
